SOCIALISM Is


Till 0h[1 war.
Mcdonald Says It Alone


Will Benefit the
Workingmen.
MUST OFFSET CAPITAL.
The President of American Labor
Union Tells Why Organization


Takes Political Stand.

MUST OFFSET CAPITAL.

pages.raw_text:
Daniel Mcdonald, national presi-
dent of the American Labor union,
with headquarters at Butte, arrived
in the city this morning. He is on
his way to Occur dAlene City, where
he will preside over a conference of
the millworkers and lumber workers
unions of that district to be held next
Tuesday for the purpose of arrang-
ing a wage scale.


All the logging camps in the vi
cinity of Occur d'Alene are now thor
ouhgly organized and in a flourishing
condition. AS yet & uniform scale of
wages has not been adopted, but this
will be the chief result of Tuesdays
convention, which will be attended by
two delegates from every union en-
titled to representation.


The adoption of socialism appears
to be the cause of the success of our
organization said Mr.. Mcdonald to-
day. "On this account we are gain
ing ground in the east We believe
in entering the political arena as that
is the only way by which the work
ingman can hope to attain the eco
nomic freedom for which he is striv-
ing.


1.-THE capitalist is In politics to
throttle the honest laborer, and 1t
stands to reason that We must use
the same power to offset him"
